name: praxis
description: Hosted, GitHub-linked CLI for project setup, testing, and submission.

scripts.db:local:reset: docker compose down -v && docker compose up -d && until docker compose exec -T postgres pg_isready -U praxis -d praxis; do sleep 1; done
scripts.build: npm run db:generate && npm run build -w @praxis/contracts && npm run build -w @praxis/core && npm run build -w @praxis/github && npm run build -w @praxis/grading && npm run build -w @praxis/api && npm run build -w @praxis/proxy && npm run build -w @praxis/cli && npm run build -w @praxis/worker
scripts.dev:watch: concurrently -k --names contracts,core,github,grading,api,proxy,worker "npm run watch -w @praxis/contracts" "npm run watch -w @praxis/core" "npm run watch -w @praxis/github" "npm run watch -w @praxis/grading" "npm run watch -w @praxis/api" "npm run watch -w @praxis/proxy" "npm run watch -w @praxis/worker"
scripts.dev:services: concurrently -k --names api,worker,web "nodemon --watch apps/api/dist --watch packages/contracts/dist --watch packages/core/dist --watch packages/github/dist --watch packages/grading/dist --ext js,json --signal SIGTERM --exec \"npm run api:dev\"" "nodemon --watch apps/worker/dist --watch packages/contracts/dist --watch packages/core/dist --watch packages/github/dist --watch packages/grading/dist --ext js,json --signal SIGTERM --exec \"npm run worker:dev\"" "npm run dev -w @praxis/web"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:bootstrap && concurrently -k "npm run dev:watch" "npm run dev:services"
